• Features a 1000x2000 tile map with procedural terrain generation and resource mining
  • Supports real-time multiplayer via MQTT broker with chat, player movement, and collaborative mining
  • Offers extensive upgrade system including drill tiers, cargo capacity, fuel efficiency, and special abilities
  • Includes building mechanics, crafting system, and various items like teleporters, explosives, and consumables
  • Provides mobile controls with touch-optimized interface and responsive design
    // Core game loop update
    this.update();
    this.draw();
    requestAnimationFrame(() => this.loop());

This is a comprehensive 2D mining game with real-time multiplayer capabilities, featuring procedural world generation, extensive upgrade systems, and a complete inventory management system. The game supports both desktop and mobile play with touch controls, offers various mining tools and explosives, and includes a shop system for upgrades and consumables. Players can collaborate in shared worlds, build structures, and explore a vast underground environment filled with different ores and resources.
